holdings.infoBox: IVSX is an equity ETF with a total of 255 individual holdings. The top holdings are Swissquote Group Holding stock at 2.18%, Italgas at 1.91%, Relo Group at 1.88%, Temenos AG at 1.75%, and Leopalace21 at 1.66%.

overview.description: The Applied Finance IVS International SMID ETF (IVSX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF focusing on long-term capital appreciation by investing in small- and mid-sized stocks in developed international markets. The fund uses proprietary fundamental analysis to select holdings IVSX was launched on Feb 19, 2026 and is issued by Applied Finance.
